implemented: float/double Equal now compares math.Float{32,64}bits on both sides; matches proto.Equal semantics (identical NaN payloads equal, -0.0 ≠ +0.0). 5 new tests in equal_test.go; contract documented in docs/generated-api.md. Perf: +2.17% on float-heavy Equal (HistogramData), noise elsewhere; Marshal/Unmarshal untouched.
